2026-0325
2026-04-09GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityCanada - Oriental Republic of Uruguay on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters ** Agreement **Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between Canada and the Oriental Republic of Uruguay on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters.N/A
subject: Canada - Oriental Republic of Uruguay on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters ** Agreement **
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement between Canada and the Oriental Republic of Uruguay on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters.
